title: Add teammate and double-stack coordination signals
summary: Pit calls are coordinated by team operations, and double-stacking or staggering teammates changes next-lap stop probability.
rationale: Pit calls are coordinated by team operations, and double-stacking or staggering teammates changes next-lap stop probability. The dataset lacks Team, but FastF1-style source data includes team information, and public race entry lists can map driver-year to team.
implementation_hint: Join or infer Team for each Driver-Year. Within Race-Year-Team, add teammate_pitted_this_lap, teammate_pitted_previous_lap, teammate_old_tyre_pressure, team_double_stack_possible, and stagger_after_teammate_stop indicators computed causally by lap.
expected_effect: Captures coordinated team behavior not represented by driver/race/compound features, adding signal when two cars share strategy calls.
risk: Synthetic or historical driver codes may not all map cleanly; missing teams should fall back to unknown so bad joins do not create noise.
disabled_reason: Disabled because an external duplicate-detection mechanism marked this hypothesis as duplicate of an existing hypothesis.
